title: Uruguayan Pudding Dessert
description: A creamy and rich dessert inspired by Uruguayan flavors, featuring a silky pudding topped with a sweet and tangy sauce.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together pudding, yogurt, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the mixture to chill and set.
Just before serving, drizzle with tempting syrup (or honey).
